scripts.dev:customer:all: concurrently --handle-input --default-input-target CUSTOMER -n BE,CUSTOMER -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix mobile/customer_app"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n BE,WEB -c blue,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix web/unimove_web"
scripts.dev:be+web: concurrently -n BACKEND,WEB -c blue,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix web/unimove_web"
